data.current_description: Create a presentation-specific URL for the user, for multiple viewers.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a presentation-specific Post-A-Link iDecide URL that can be shared with multiple viewers. Requires authentication and a presentation identifier. Returns the generated URL and associated metadata. This URL enables multiple users to access and view the specified presentation without individual authentication.
data.reasoning: The description lacks clarity about required inputs (which presentation?), what is returned (just URL or metadata?), and the purpose/effect of creating a shareable link. Added details about authentication requirement, input expectations, return value, and the functional benefit for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Get a list of iDecide presentations a user has access to.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all iDecide presentations the authenticated user has access to. Requires authentication. Returns an array of presentation objects containing presentation identifiers, names, metadata, and access information. Results reflect the user's current permissions and access level.
data.reasoning: Summary uses generic 'presentations' instead of domain-specific 'iDecide presentations'. data.current_description: Get latest completed iDecide view sessions.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve latest completed iDecide view sessions.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the latest completed iDecide view sessions for the authenticated user. Accepts a limit parameter to control the number of results returned. Returns an array of completed session objects containing session identifiers, presentation information, viewer details, completion timestamps, and session metadata. Sessions are ordered by completion time in descending order.
data.reasoning: Description is too brief and lacks critical details about parameters (what does the parameter do?), return structure, and result ordering. Added parameter explanation, detailed return format, and sorting behavior to enable AI agents to understand how to use this operation effectively.

message: Operation 'get_/backoffice/idecides/sessions/started' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, vague_description. data.current_description: Get latest started iDecide view sessions. Includes finished and unfinished sessions.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve latest started iDecide view sessions.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the latest started iDecide view sessions for the authenticated user, including both completed and in-progress sessions. Accepts a limit parameter to control the number of results returned. Returns an array of session objects containing session identifiers, presentation information, viewer details, start timestamps, completion status, and session metadata. Sessions are ordered by start time in descending order.
data.reasoning: Description mentions 'finished and unfinished' but lacks clarity on parameter usage, return structure, and ordering. Enhanced to clarify parameter purpose, detailed return format including status indicators, and result ordering to improve AI agent interpretability when deciding whether to use this operation.

data.current_description: Verify an iDecide-issued security token is valid and not expired.

data.current_description: Get user details for a security token.

data.reasoning: Original summary and description are unclear about the action and inputs. The description 'Get user details for a security token' is ambiguous - it doesn't clarify that the token is provided via Authorization header or what user details are returned. message: Operation 'post_/backoffice/idecides/triggers/started' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, missing_side_effects. data.current_description: Subscribe to a 'started' event for a specific iDecide presentation by registering a REST hook URL.
data.summary_suggestion: Register webhook for presentation started event.
data.description_suggestion: Register a REST hook webhook URL to receive notifications when a specific iDecide presentation begins. The registered URL will receive POST callbacks whenever the presentation's 'started' event is triggered. Requires the presentation ID and webhook URL in the request. Returns subscription confirmation with hook ID for future management.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses 'Subscribe' which is less precise than 'Register webhook'. data.current_description: Remove an existing event subscription.
